title: Chris Cassidy
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Chris Cassidy''' is the author of four short stories, three co-authored with [[Tish Eggleston Pahl|Tish Pahl]]—"[[A Credit for Your Thoughts]]," "[[Hutt and Seek]]," and "[[Simple Tricks]]"—and one solo tale, "[[Precipice]]."

She [[Tuckerization|tuckerized]] fan [[Tracy Duncan]] as [[Dunc T'racen]] in "Hutt and Seek," and helped make a custom action figure of [[Kettch]] for [[Aaron Allston]].

{{Author-stub}}

==Works==
===Bibliography===
*"[[Precipice]]" for [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] (2008)
*{{GamerCite|2|A Credit for Your Thoughts}} (2000) (co-written with [[Tish Eggleston Pahl]])
*{{StoryCite|story=Hutt and Seek|book=Tales from the New Republic}} (1999) (co-written with [[Tish Eggleston Pahl]])
*{{StoryCite|story=Simple Tricks|book=Tales from the New Republic}} (1999) (co-written with [[Tish Eggleston Pahl]])

|pl=Chris Cassidy
}}
